allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $pid5000 = $c[0].OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $pid5000 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600; $c2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c2\) { "still listening" } else { "stopped pid $pid5000; port free" } } else { "no listener \(already stopped\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime })
